title: UnSpam.email deliverability test — 66/100, SPF/DKIM/HTML failing
html:
UnSpam.email scoring Yahir's vrtlpirates.com outreach mail at 66/100 right after the namecheap DNS pass — SPF flagged BAD (no -all/ptr), DKIM BAD (email not signed), DMARC WARN, HTML body failing best-practices. The exact pre-launch deliverability cleanup before any aeo agency cold campaign.

TL;DR

  • vrtl pirates outbound email scored 66/100 by unspam email in Sept 2025 — SPF / DKIM / HTML all flagged.
  • Specific gaps: missing -all mechanism on SPF, DKIM signing not actually applied, body needs HTML-best-practice cleanup.
  • Companion to the same-evening Namecheap DNS screenshot — together they document the email deliverability hardening pass for the aeo agency launch.

vrtl pirates · email deliverability · spf dkim dmarc · unspam email · aeo agency · namecheap

related.label: Namecheap DNS records — vrtlpirates.com SPF/DKIM/DMARC setup
